title: meehania urticifolia var. pinetorum
intro: Meehania urticifolia var. pinetorum is a variant of the Meehania urticifolia plant, commonly known as Himalayan mehania or Himalayan creeping fern, a type of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Meehania urticifolia var. pinetorum include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Traditionally, the plant has been used to make herbal preparations such as teas and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
